children.name: Naked NFTS - now a separate project
Hodratz are uniquely generated and collectible NFTs. Each of them is one-of-a-kind and 100% owned by you.
children.characters:
Hodratz are uniquely generated and collectible NFTs.

children.name: There’s a long road ahead, but we like keeping deadlines.
children.characters: There’s a long road ahead, but we like keeping deadlines.

children.name: Launch all 10,000 algorithmically generated Hoodratz to our awesome community.

children.name: Buy, sell and trade Hoodratz on nakednft.com and opensea.com

children.name: Exclusive Hoodratz merch will be available in our store... Our team has been working on this one a lot so we are sure you will love it!
